positive: A minimalist, whimsical illustration featuring a group of stylized forest animals (fox, owl, deer, raccoon) gathered in a gentle, abstract forest clearing. The style should be modern Nordic folk art meets bold pop art, characterized by clean, bold lines, flat washes of muted earthy colors (sage green, terracotta, deep navy, mustard yellow), and strong, deliberate silhouette shapes. The composition must be central and circular, creating a cohesive visual grouping suitable for apparel placement. The lighting is flat and studio-like, maximizing color saturation and contrast for printing. The background should be a simple, solid-color gradient or pattern that does not distract from the main subjects. Vector art quality, highly detailed, intricate pattern work, high contrast, symmetrical composition.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, grayscale, realistic photo, logo, text, watermark, signature, copyright, jpeg compression, gradient mesh
